name: date-picker
label: Date Picker
description: A calendar date picker bound to a read-only input, with month navigation, today/selected highlighting and several display formats. The calendar is teleported so it never clips. Works with wire:model.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown before a date is chosen.

props.name: format
props.description: How the selected date is formatted.

props.name: name
props.description: Name for a hidden input, for plain form submission.
